name: The Warden's Seal
description: A heavy iron ring, too large for a finger — meant to be worn on a gauntlet. The outer face is stamped with a spiral sun, the same mark as the chanfrons on the warhorse skeletons. It has never left this tomb.
secret: The inner band is engraved in the same old dialect as the r07 inscriptions: 'I will hold until the line holds.' It is a vow. Vrath was not interred here as a prisoner — he stayed willingly as the ward's anchor. Whatever broke the ward in r07 broke the compact he swore to uphold. Someone released him from outside.
value: No coin value. The Crestfall temple records Brother Edwyn mentioned would identify this ring as proof of who originally commissioned the ward — and implicitly, who was responsible for its breaking.
